expectations.text: Uses a concise but meaningful window name
expectations.evidence: Uses 'api-server', which is meaningful and stable for this logical task.

expectations.text: Explains rerun as replacing the same logical task window
expectations.evidence: Clearly frames rerun as replacing the old same-name window rather than making duplicates.
Explicitly says to preserve observability after exit when possible.
Keeps the answer at the rule-and-flow level instead of dropping into a long shell template.
